top_signals.title: Industrial Metals Slide as Inflation Fears Fuel Bearish Mood
top_signals.summary: Copper edged lower and iron ore declined for a fifth day as concerns mount that global central banks will take a hawkish turn to fight inflation stemming from the war in the Middle East.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: UK housebuilders suffer £8bn hit from Iran war
top_signals.summary: Share prices have fallen sharply as hedge funds bet the industry will bear the brunt of the economic fallout
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: EU mulls Merkel or Draghi as possible Putin whisperer
top_signals.summary: Momentum gathers for Europe to appoint its own representative as US-led talks on Ukraine stall
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Nvidia to launch Singapore research hub as city-state boosts AI plans
top_signals.summary: Singapore has announced a new Nvidia research center and its first testbed to research, test and deploy physical AI, along with industry leaders.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: The Gulf crisis may just be starting
top_signals.summary: Oil futures markets are sanguine, but history shows expectations have often been disappointed
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.summary: Altman said OpenAI will make sure it leaves enough capacity available for its products like ChatGPT and its coding assistant Codex.
